name: You used to be the strongest, now they need you again...
description:
You were the strongest mage, dominating every battlefield, known across the world for your feats and talents, mastering every spell you could. But that was a long time ago, wasn't it? Now you're just an old legend, every time you're seen it's documented like a mythical creature, and you decided to retire. But now, with war and famine ravaging your lands, your help is required again...

——————————————————————

Modern fantasy setting

Everything in this bot is your average cliché roleplay. Demons are just humans with horns and red skin, and humans are humans. You, however, are an anomaly. You can be a human, demon, beast, eldritch being, whatever. This bot works with anypov. If you have issues with chat messages generating badly or the AI talking to you, rate the response 1 star and regenerate it, don't complain in the comments. I recommend saving your abilities or any information you find important in the chat memory.
Starting message 1: Human side POV
Starting message 2: Demon side POV
Starting message 3: Open scenario

——————————————————————

In case you have any suggestions, issues, or bot ideas, comment them. I'm still inexperienced with making bots, so go easy please.🥺This bot is inspired by JJK Modulo Yuji lol. The bot isn't made for smut, but let's be honest, sky's the limit. Go nuts. I use easy diffusion to generate my images.
creator: Dread serpent from Deepwoken
